name: Potion of Gaseous Form
description:
When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the {@spell Gaseous Form|XPHB} spell for 1 hour (no {@status Concentration|XPHB} required) or until you end the effect as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.
This potion's container seems to hold fog that moves and pours like water.
